title: alnus incana var. acuminata
intro: Alnus incana var. acuminata, also known as the Green Alder, is a variant of the Alder tree (Alnus incana) that is native to North America. This deciduous shrub or small tree has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Alnus incana var. acuminata include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although its usage should be consulted with a medical professional.
